title: ModelRegistry
description: STORY-032.6: model-centric registry (configs/models.yaml). Each entry is a self-named model with its own base_url + Secret Broker handle + optional pricing/limit. Agents route by the self-chosen name in model_routing.yaml. External CLI tools register with kind: cli (EPIC-033).

models.description: The named models the operator registered.

name.description: Operator's own label, e.g. 'my-cheap-coder'. Agents route by this.

kind.description: Adapter kind. cli = external CLI tool (EPIC-033).

base_url.description: Endpoint base URL (auto-filled per kind, or manual). Not required for kind: cli.

secret_handle.description: Secret Broker handle for the credential — never the value itself.

pricing.description: ALL optional. $ / 1M tokens. Absent → cost reported as 'unknown' (tokens still counted).

limit.description: Rate limit (req/min) — optional, feeds scheduling, not cost.

cli.description: Present only when kind = cli (external CLI tool, EPIC-033).
